message:
test: Add renderable snapshot tests and rich core integration tests

- renderable_snapshots.rs: 45 tests covering all 12 rich renderables
  (Align, Columns, Emoji, Group, JsonView, Padding, Panel, Pretty,
  Rule, Tree, Table) plus composition and zero-area safety tests
- rich_core_integration.rs: 27 tests covering Console, Segments,
  Style stack, Measurement, Borders, Filesize, Live display
- Close bd-3bp.13 (Rich Renderables Test Suite)
- Close bd-tb84 (v1 Definition of Done - all criteria verified)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
